hero.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
hero.author: Theodore Roosevelt

aries.general: You're filled with energy; use it wisely to achieve your goals.
aries.love: Passion flares up today, making you more attractive to others.
aries.career: A breakthrough in your project is likely; stay focused.

taurus.general: Stability is key today; hold onto what you value.
taurus.love: Expect some warm gestures from your partner.
taurus.career: Consider a new approach to overcoming obstacles at work.

gemini.general: Your dual nature favors versatility; explore new avenues.
gemini.love: Communicate openly to strengthen your relationships.
gemini.career: Collaboration will lead to success; share your ideas.

cancer.general: Emotional clarity will guide you through difficult moments.
cancer.love: An unexpected expression of love enhances your day.
cancer.career: Lean into your intuition; it will serve you well in decisions.

leo.general: You radiate confidence; people are drawn to your energy.
leo.love: Express your feelings boldly; they may be reciprocated.
leo.career: Showcase your talents; recognition is imminent.

virgo.general: Details matter; pay attention for optimal outcomes.
virgo.love: A practical approach will resolve any misunderstandings.
virgo.career: Your hard work will soon pay off; stay patient.

libra.general: Balance is crucial; seek harmony in your surroundings.
libra.love: Compromise will deepen your connection with someone special.
libra.career: Networking could open new doors; don’t hesitate to reach out.

scorpio.general: Intensity guides your interactions; use it to benefit yourself.
scorpio.love: Mystery surrounds your romantic life; embrace it.
scorpio.career: A strategic approach will resolve workplace issues.

sagittarius.general: Adventurous spirit boosts your energy; explore new possibilities.
sagittarius.love: Your free spirit attracts admiration; enjoy the attention.
sagittarius.career: Seize opportunities as they arise; don't hold back.

capricorn.general: Discipline is your ally today; stay committed to your goals.
capricorn.love: Stability in relationships brings a sense of security.
capricorn.career: Your leadership skills shine; others will follow your lead.

aquarius.general: Innovation and originality are your themes; think outside the box.
aquarius.love: An unusual date could lead to a meaningful connection.
aquarius.career: Embrace change at work; it will spur growth.

pisces.general: Your imagination is vivid; create something beautiful today.
pisces.love: Emotional connections deepen; be open and vulnerable.
pisces.career: Artistic endeavors thrive; follow your creative instincts.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Opportunity is missed by most people because it is dressed in overalls and looks like work.
professional.author: Thomas Edison

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: You don’t have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
professional.author: Zig Ziglar

motivation.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivation.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
motivation.author: Winston S. Churchill

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are. Know that there is something inside you that is greater than any obstacle.
motivation.author: Christian D. Larson

captions.text: Life is a journey, not a destination.
captions.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

captions.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
captions.author: Walt Whitman

captions.text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
captions.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: Strive not to be a success, but rather to be of value.
captions.author: Albert Einstein

captions.text: Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
captions.author: Winston S. Churchill

captions.text: It’s not whether you get knocked down, it’s whether you get up.
captions.author: Vince Lombardi

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: We are stuck with technology when what we really want is just stuff that works.
tech.author: Douglas Adams

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

fun.text: Life is more fun if you don't take it too seriously.
fun.author: Author Unknown

fun.text: Just because you're awake doesn't mean you should stop dreaming.
fun.author: Author Unknown

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: If you think adventure is dangerous, try routine; it's lethal.
fun.author: Paul Coelho

fun.text: Life is short, smile while you still have teeth.
fun.author: Author Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Everything that is done in the world is done by hope.
faith.author: Martin Luther

faith.text: In faith there is enough light for those who want to believe.
faith.author: George M. Trevelyan

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
faith.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

faith.text: Where there is faith, there is love; where there is love, there is peace; where there is peace, there is God; where there is God, there is no need.
faith.author: Author Unknown

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: Patience is not the ability to wait, but the ability to keep a good attitude while waiting.
wisdom.author: Joyce Meyer

wisdom.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
wisdom.author: Buddha
